package rulecoverage

import (
    "gopkg.in/yaml.v3"
)

// Positive scenario for yaml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same local YAML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
type envelope struct { ID string }

func PositiveYamlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes(payload []byte) {
    var first envelope
    var second envelope
    yaml.Unmarshal(payload, &first)
    yaml.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
